subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: The Blessed Beauty hath forbidden such practices. We are a new creation; [we have] ancient customs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمال مبارک این گونه حرکات را نهی فرمودند ما خلق جدیدیم عادت قدیمه
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @religious rituals minimized or eliminated, @unity; oneness of humanity
